title: Hut 8 Reports Third Quarter 2025 Results
text: Hut 8 Q3 2025 Earnings. Revenue: $83.5 million (vs. $43.7 million YoY, 91% growth). Net income: $50.6 million (vs. $0.9 million YoY). Adjusted EBITDA: $109.0 million (vs. $5.6 million YoY). Revenue breakdown: Power $8.4M, Digital Infrastructure $5.1M, Compute $70.0M. Energy Capacity: Under Management 1,020 MW, Under Development 1,530 MW, Under Exclusivity 1,255 MW, Under Diligence 5,865 MW, Total pipeline 8,650 MW. Bitcoin Holdings: Strategic reserve 13,696 BTC, Market value $1.6 billion as of Sept 30, 2025. Computing Power: Total hashrate 26.8 EH/s, Operational 23.7 EH/s. CEO Asher Genoot: Reached inflection point in scale and maturity of development flywheel, 1,530 MW in active development, potential expansion to 2.5+ GW. Strong operational execution and pipeline advancement.
